7:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}]}],": When the relationship became true"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]}],": When it ceased being true (NULL = current)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"confidence"}]}],": How certain we are about this fact"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]}],": Which memory entry this was extracted from"]}],"\n"]}]
8:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Query Patterns"}]
9:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Direct Neighbors"}]
a:["$","$L1c",null,{"code":"# Who works on Project Alpha?\nmem.query_facts(predicate=\"works_on\", object=\"Project Alpha\")\n# &gt; Alice\n","language":"python"}]
b:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Path Traversal"}]
c:["$","$L1c",null,{"code":"# What services does Project Alpha depend on (2 hops)?\nmem.traverse(subject=\"Project Alpha\", depth=2)\n# &gt; Auth Service &gt; Bob (maintainer)\n","language":"python"}]
d:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Temporal Filtering"}]
e:["$","$L1c",null,{"code":"# What were Alice's preferences as of March 1?\nmem.query_facts(\n  subject=\"Alice\",\n  predicate=\"prefers_language\",\n  at_time=\"2026-03-01\",\n)\n","language":"python"}]

10:["$","$L1c",null,{"code":"stats = mem.graph_stats()\nprint(f\"Entities: {stats.entity_count}\")\nprint(f\"Relationships: {stats.edge_count}\")\nprint(f\"Predicates: {stats.predicate_count}\")\nprint(f\"Coverage: {stats.temporal_coverage}\")\n","language":"python"}]
11:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Implementation"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"The graph is stored in SQLite with:"}]
13:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Nodes table"}],": Entity lookup and deduplication"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Edges table"}],": Triples with temporal validity"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Indices"}],": Subject, predicate, object, and time-range indexes"]}],"\n"]}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":"No external graph database required."}]
15:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L1d",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Performance Tip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Graph queries are fast for shallow traversals (1–3 hops). Deep traversals (5+ hops) may require optimization. Consider materializing common paths if your use case requires deep graph walks."}]}]]}]]}]}]
